name: 88st-cloud-static-site
description: Static build shim for Cloudflare Pages

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-brand-pages.mjs && node scripts/seo-intelligence-v36.mjs && node scripts/generate-v47-comprehensive-upgrade.mjs && node scripts/generate-v43-quality-data.mjs && node scripts/gen-build-ver.mjs
scripts.seo:refresh: node scripts/generate-brand-pages.mjs && node scripts/generate-static-seo-og.mjs && node scripts/generate-related-posts.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/generate-indexing-audit.mjs && node scripts/generate-ctr-report.mjs && node scripts/generate-traffic-roadmap.mjs
